cases.name: category_update_atomic_reindex
cases.expected: category row, localized translation, and Blog-scope ReindexRequested outbox record commit in one transaction

cases.name: category_delete_atomic_reindex
cases.expected: category deletion and Blog-scope ReindexRequested outbox record commit together; failed deletion publishes no event

cases.name: tenant_scoped_translations
cases.expected: category translation reads, updates, and deletes are constrained by tenant_id and category_id

cases.name: tenant_scoped_parent
cases.expected: a parent category must exist in the same tenant before the child category transaction inserts

cases.name: non_empty_slug
cases.expected: create and translation upsert reject normalized slugs that contain no ASCII letter or digit instead of persisting an empty route key

cases.name: bounded_permission_namespace
cases.expected: blog_posts actions are the primary Blog category capability; generic categories actions are accepted only as a temporary legacy fallback and are not advertised by BlogModule

cases.name: category_has_no_owner_scope
cases.expected: category update/delete use resource scope rather than comparing the authenticated user UUID to the category UUID

cases.name: mounted_http_write_path
cases.expected: Blog category HTTP mutations construct CategoryService with TransactionalEventBus from HostRuntimeContext

cases.name: bounded_category_list
cases.expected: both owner service and HTTP adapter normalize page to at least one and clamp per_page to the range 1..100

cases.name: typed_http_errors
cases.expected: category not found, validation, forbidden, and unexpected failures map to 404, 400, 403, and safe 500 responses respectively

cases.name: search_payload_dependency
cases.expected: Blog search documents project category_name and category_slug, so category changes require Blog-scope rebuild

runtime_promotion_requirements: execute category create/update/delete HTTP requests with blog_posts RBAC
execute the same requests with legacy categories RBAC during the compatibility window
verify BlogModule registration does not seed catalog categories permissions
verify one outbox record is committed for category update and delete
verify an outbox write failure rolls back the category mutation
run Search ingestion and confirm category_name/category_slug change in related Blog documents
verify cross-tenant category IDs, parent IDs, and translations cannot be read or mutated
verify non-ASCII names require an explicit non-empty ASCII slug
verify category list limits remain bounded through direct service and HTTP calls
